name: Garlicky Portobello Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 12 large Fresh portobello mushrooms (washed and stems removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine and olive oil in a small pot over medium heat.
2. Add lemon juice, minced garlic, and black pepper; stir to combine.
3. Wash and prepare 12 large fresh portobello mushrooms by removing any stems.
4. Slice mushrooms larger than 3 inches in diameter into strips.
5. Brush the prepared mushrooms generously with the melted mixture.
6. Grill the mushrooms upside down over medium-hot coals for about 8 minutes.
7. Turn the mushrooms and grill them an additional 8 minutes, or until tender and well browned.
